# UX Destroyer Pro

> Toggle 10 anti-UX patterns live on the page — experience the worst of web design.

## Tech Stack
- React 18, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS
- Framer Motion, canvas-confetti, html2canvas, Lucide React

## Key Files
- src/App.tsx — main application entry
- src/components/ — UI components (pattern toggles, chaos meter, boss mode, premium trap)
- src/store/ — state management for active anti-patterns
- src/utils/ — anti-pattern implementations, scoring

## Features
- 10 toggleable anti-UX patterns, Boss Mode with survival timer
- Chaos meter, UX score, rickroll easter egg, premium trap, dark pattern showcase

## URLs
- Live: https://ux-destroyer-pro.netlify.app
- Repo: https://github.com/arnoldwender/ux-destroyer-pro
